message:
chore(fcp-e2e,fwc): clippy lint fixes and idiomatic Rust improvements

fcp-e2e/host_e2e.rs:
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines, clippy::cast_precision_loss)] to
  build_evidence_bundle() to suppress false-positive lints on a
  necessarily large method

fcp-e2e/lib.rs:
- Replace map_or() with map_or_else() for the transport string default
  to avoid eager allocation of "unspecified".to_string() on the happy path

fcp-e2e/logging.rs:
- Add # Panics doc section and #[must_use] to
  with_session_transcript_entry()

fwc/pipe.rs:
- Remove unnecessary .clone() on value returned from resolve_json_path
  (the value is already owned via the match)

fwc/schema_nav.rs:
- Change array_item_fill_path() to return String instead of Option<String>
  since it always returns Some — eliminates downstream unwrap/map calls
- Replace if-let-else chains with map_or_else() in scaffold_value() and
  normalize_schema() for clippy manual_map lint
- Use std::string::ToString::to_string method reference instead of
  closure in enum validation error formatting
- Use Some(item_path.as_str()) instead of item_path.as_deref() for
  clarity in fill_template_at_path

fwc/search.rs:
- Add #[must_use] to RiskCeiling::parse(), RiskCeiling::allows(),
  SafetyCeiling::parse(), search_operations(), and results_to_json()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
